children.heading: Adjustments applicable to all taxpayers
children.label: a Adjustments applicable to all taxpayers

children.heading: Property other than certain personal property
children.label: i Property other than certain personal property
children.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), the depreciation deduction allowable under section 167 with respect to any tangible property placed in service after , shall be determined under the alternative system of section 168(g). In the case of property placed in service after , the preceding sentence shall not apply but clause (ii) shall continue to apply.December 31, 1986December 31, 1998

children.heading: 150-percent declining balance method for certain property
children.label: ii 150-percent declining balance method for certain property
I
children.text: the 150 percent declining balance method,

children.label: II
children.text: switching to the straight line method for the 1st taxable year for which using the straight line method with respect to the adjusted basis as of the beginning of the year will yield a higher allowance.

children.heading: Exception for certain property
children.label: B Exception for certain property
children.text: This paragraph shall not apply to property described in paragraph (1), (2), (3), or (4) of section 168(f), or in section 168(e)(3)(C)(iv).

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: This paragraph shall not apply to property placed in service after , to which the amendments made by section 201 of the Tax Reform Act of 1986 do not apply by reason of section 203, 204, or 251(d) of such Act.December 31, 1986

children.heading: Treatment of certain property placed in service before 1987
children.label: ii Treatment of certain property placed in service before 1987
children.text: This paragraph shall apply to any property to which the amendments made by section 201 of the Tax Reform Act of 1986 apply by reason of an election under section 203(a)(1)(B) of such Act without regard to the requirement of subparagraph (A) that the property be placed in service after .December 31, 1986

children.heading: Normalization rules
children.label: D Normalization rules
children.text: With respect to public utility property described in section 168(i)(10), the Secretary shall prescribe the requirements of a normalization method of accounting for this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: With respect to each mine or other natural deposit (other than an oil, gas, or geothermal well) of the taxpayer, the amount allowable as a deduction under section 616(a) or 617(a) (determined without regard to section 291(b)) in computing the regular tax for costs paid or incurred after , shall be capitalized and amortized ratably over the 10-year period beginning with the taxable year in which the expenditures were made.December 31, 1986

children.label: i
children.text: the amount allowable under section 165(a) for the expenditures if they had remained capitalized, or

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of such expenditures which have not previously been amortized under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Treatment of certain long-term contracts
children.label: 3 Treatment of certain long-term contracts
children.text: In the case of any long-term contract entered into by the taxpayer on or after , the taxable income from such contract shall be determined under the percentage of completion method of accounting (as modified by section 460(b)). For purposes of the preceding sentence, in the case of a contract described in section 460(e)(1), the percentage of the contract completed shall be determined under section 460(b)(1) by using the simplified procedures for allocation of costs prescribed under section 460(b)(3). The first sentence of this paragraph shall not apply to any residential construction contract (as defined in section 460(e)(4)).March 1, 1986

children.heading: Alternative tax net operating loss deduction
children.label: 4 Alternative tax net operating loss deduction
children.text: The alternative tax net operating loss deduction shall be allowed in lieu of the net operating loss deduction allowed under section 172.

children.heading: Pollution control facilities
children.label: 5 Pollution control facilities
children.text: In the case of any certified pollution control facility placed in service after , the deduction allowable under section 169 (without regard to section 291) shall be determined under the alternative system of section 168(g). In the case of such a facility placed in service after , such deduction shall be determined under section 168 using the straight line method.December 31, 1986December 31, 1998

children.heading: Adjusted basis
children.label: 6 Adjusted basis
children.text: The adjusted basis of any property to which paragraph (1) or (5) applies (or with respect to which there are any expenditures to which paragraph (2) or subsection (b)(2) applies) shall be determined on the basis of the treatment prescribed in paragraph (1), (2), or (5), or subsection (b)(2), whichever applies.

children.text: Section 87 (relating to alcohol fuel credit) shall not apply.

children.heading: Treatment of certain recoveries
children.label: C Treatment of certain recoveries
children.text: No recovery of any tax to which subparagraph (A)(ii) applied shall be included in gross income for purposes of determining alternative minimum taxable income.

children.heading: Standard deduction and deduction for personal exemptions not allowed
children.label: D Standard deduction and deduction for personal exemptions not allowed
children.text: The standard deduction under section 63(c), the deduction for personal exemptions under section 151, and the deduction under section 642(b) shall not be allowed.

children.heading: Section 68 not applicable
children.label: E Section 68 not applicable
children.text: Section 68 shall not apply.

children.heading: Exception for certain research and experimental expenditures
children.label: C Exception for certain research and experimental expenditures
children.text: If the taxpayer materially participates (within the meaning of section 469(h)) in an activity, this paragraph shall not apply to any amount allowable as a deduction under section 174(a) or 174A(a) for expenditures paid or incurred in connection with such activity.

children.heading: Treatment of incentive stock options
children.label: 3 Treatment of incentive stock options
children.text: Section 421 shall not apply to the transfer of stock acquired pursuant to the exercise of an incentive stock option (as defined in section 422). Section 422(c)(2) shall apply in any case where the disposition and the inclusion for purposes of this part are within the same taxable year and such section shall not apply in any other case. The adjusted basis of any stock so acquired shall be determined on the basis of the treatment prescribed by this paragraph.
